C:\Users\lain\emsdk\upstream\emscripten\em++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -sMODULARIZE=1 -sEXPORT_ES6=1 -sEXPORT_NAME=createChromaprintModule -sENVIRONMENT=web,worker -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sINITIAL_MEMORY=16MB "-sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['cwrap','ccall','getValue','setValue','UTF8ToString','stringToUTF8','lengthBytesUTF8','HEAPU8','HEAP16']" "-sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=['_malloc','_free','_mc_web_chromaprint_new','_mc_web_chromaprint_start','_mc_web_chromaprint_feed','_mc_web_chromaprint_finish','_mc_web_chromaprint_get_compressed','_mc_web_chromaprint_free']" -O3 @CMakeFiles\chromaprint.dir\objects1.rsp -o chromaprint.js
